import os, numpy as np, math, sys

os.chdir('/opt/habitat-lab-src')
import habitat, habitat_sim
from habitat.config.default import get_config
from habitat.config import read_write

cfg_path = "/opt/habitat-lab-src/habitat-lab/habitat/config/benchmark/multi_agent/hssd_spot_human_social_nav.yaml"
config = get_config(cfg_path)
with read_write(config):
    config.habitat.simulator.scene_dataset = "/opt/habitat-lab-src/data/hab3_bench_assets/hab3-hssd/hab3-hssd.scene_dataset_config.json"
    config.habitat.dataset.scenes_dir = "/opt/habitat-lab-src/data/scene_datasets"
    config.habitat.dataset.split = "val"

env = habitat.Env(config=config)
env.seed(42)

print("=== Action space ===")
print(env.action_space)
sample = env.action_space.sample()
print("\n=== Sample action (type and content) ===")
print(f"type: {type(sample)}")
if isinstance(sample, dict):
    for k, v in sample.items():
        if isinstance(v, dict):
            for k2, v2 in v.items():
                print(f"  {k} -> {k2}: shape={np.array(v2).shape}, values={v2}")
        else:
            print(f"  {k}: value={v}")

obs = env.reset()
agent0_state = env.sim.get_agent(0).state
start_pos = np.array(agent0_state.position)
start_quat = agent0_state.rotation
print(f"\nStart pos: {start_pos}")
print(f"Start quat: x={start_quat.x:.6f} y={start_quat.y:.6f} z={start_quat.z:.6f} w={start_quat.w:.6f}")

# Try stepping with the sampled action for 5 steps
print("\n=== Stepping with sample action 5 times ===")
for i in range(5):
    obs = env.step(sample)
    if env.episode_over:
        print("Episode over at step", i)
        break
    agent0_state = env.sim.get_agent(0).state
    pos = np.array(agent0_state.position)
    delta = pos - start_pos
    rot = agent0_state.rotation
    print(f"Step {i+1}: pos={pos}, delta={delta}, quat=({rot.x:.6f},{rot.y:.6f},{rot.z:.6f},{rot.w:.6f})")

# Now test with our own dict-of-dicts format
print("\n=== Test custom action: forward [0.5, 0.0] ===")
env.close()
env = habitat.Env(config=config)
env.seed(42)
obs = env.reset()
start_pos = np.array(env.sim.get_agent(0).state.position)

action = {
    'agent_0_base_velocity': {'agent_0_base_vel': np.array([0.5, 0.0], dtype=np.float32)},
    'agent_1_oracle_nav_randcoord_action': {'agent_1_oracle_nav_randcoord_action': np.array([1.0], dtype=np.float32)},
}
print("Action dict:", action)
for i in range(5):
    obs = env.step(action)
    if env.episode_over:
        print("Episode over at step", i)
        break
    agent0_state = env.sim.get_agent(0).state
    pos = np.array(agent0_state.position)
    delta = pos - start_pos
    rot = agent0_state.rotation
    print(f"Step {i+1}: pos={pos}, delta={delta}, quat=({rot.x:.6f},{rot.y:.6f},{rot.z:.6f},{rot.w:.6f})")

# Test turning
print("\n=== Test turning [0.0, 1.0] ===")
env.close()
env = habitat.Env(config=config)
env.seed(42)
obs = env.reset()
start_pos = np.array(env.sim.get_agent(0).state.position)

action = {
    'agent_0_base_velocity': {'agent_0_base_vel': np.array([0.0, 1.0], dtype=np.float32)},
    'agent_1_oracle_nav_randcoord_action': {'agent_1_oracle_nav_randcoord_action': np.array([1.0], dtype=np.float32)},
}
print("Action:", action)
for i in range(10):
    obs = env.step(action)
    if env.episode_over:
        print("Episode over at step", i)
        break
    agent0_state = env.sim.get_agent(0).state
    pos = np.array(agent0_state.position)
    rot = agent0_state.rotation
    # Compute yaw from rotation matrix
    from habitat_sim.utils.common import quat_from_coeffs, quat_to_magnum
    # Better: compute forward vector manually
    # rotation matrix columns: local x-axis in world
    q = rot
    R00 = 1 - 2*(q.y*q.y + q.z*q.z)
    R10 = 2*(q.x*q.y + q.z*q.w)
    R20 = 2*(q.x*q.z - q.y*q.w)
    yaw = math.atan2(R20, R00)
    print(f"Step {i+1}: pos=({pos[0]:.3f},{pos[2]:.3f}), yaw={math.degrees(yaw):.1f} deg, quat=({rot.x:.6f},{rot.y:.6f},{rot.z:.6f},{rot.w:.6f})")

env.close()
print("\nDone.")
